achievements.title: Ready to Start
achievements.description: Let Slash join the party and talk to Mom and Dad to receive an Herb and a PorkChop. (m: This can be only done at the start of the game)
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Treasures in Greatlog
achievements.description: Find all the items inside chests and other treasure containers in Greatlog.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: A Oasys in the World Oasis
achievements.description: Complete the Desert World.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Pots and Chests
achievements.description: Find all the items inside chests and other treasure containers in the Desert World.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: New Friend!
achievements.description: Let a Beavern from Mirage Lake in the Desert World join your party.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Friendship
achievements.description: Give a SpotSlime to the girl in Greatlog and talk with her grandfather.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Mom's Errands
achievements.description: Complete all of Mom's errands. (m: You can't do this in the post game)
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Ahoy!
achievements.description: Win the Kids tournament and get the Pirate Key.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Earthquake
achievements.description: Talk to the old man in Yold and witness the earthquake.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: The Steps Aren't That Long
achievements.description: Unlock the shortcut in Greatlog. (m: At some point you can't trigger this event)
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: LureDance
achievements.description: Use LureDance to be visited by a Mermaid in Port of Polona Village for a Tiny Medal. (m: You can't get this medal if you started the MoonRock mission)
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Skelethors
achievements.description: Defeat all the BoneSlaves and the Boss in the Ghost Ship in one session without leaving the ship. (m: None of this enemies respawn and the ship disappear after finishing it)
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Navigating the Seven Seas
achievements.description: Complete the Sea World.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Pots and Barrels
achievements.description: Find all the items inside chests and other treasure containers in the Sea World. (m: After beating the boss in the Ghost Ship, the ship disappears)
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: So, What Do You Get from This?
achievements.description: Breed any of your monsters with the Monster Tamer's Armorpede in the Arena after completing the Sea World. (m: Available only before completing the Ice World)
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: A Very Usefull Item
achievements.description: Get the Sailor Ring from the Mermaid Queen.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: The King of Squids
achievements.description: Defeat KingSquid in the Sea World.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Why None of You Can Go for This Monsters?
achievements.description: Give a Madgopher to your dad and a ArmyAnt to a merchant in Greatlog to get the Ice key.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: The End of the Winter
achievements.description: Complete the Ice World.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Cold Treasures
achievements.description: Find all the items inside chests and other treasure containers in the Ice World.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Another Free Fusions
achievements.description: Breed any of your monsters with the Monster Tamers's monsters in the Arena and Tavern after completing Ice World. (m: One Tamer disappear after the completing Sky World and the other in the Post-game)
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: The Worst Guardians in the World
achievements.description: Defeat all the Skeletors and the Boss in the Hunted Castle in one session without leaving the castle. (m: None of this enemies respawn and they disappear with the Boss)
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Beating the Royal Guard
achievements.description: Defeat all the EvilArmors and the Boss in the Castle of Hitano in one session without leaving the castle. (m: None of this enemies respawn and they disappear with the Boss).
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: The Floating Land
achievements.description: Complete the Sky World.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Celestial Chests
achievements.description: Find all the items inside chests and other treasure containers in the Sky World.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: I Don't Think This Fusions Are Very Useful
achievements.description: Breed any of your monsters with the Monster Tamer's Gulpple in the Tavern after completing the Sky World. (m: This character disappear in the Post-game)
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: King of Limbo
achievements.description: Complete Limbo.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: 2 Free Eggs
achievements.description: Get the Eggs from the Couple in the Residential Area and the Mercant in the Egg Evaluator's place in Greatlog.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: The Name of This Monster Sounds Familiar
achievements.description: Exchange 10 Tiny Medals for a Darck Egg.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Last Fusions?
achievements.description: Breed any of your monsters with the Monster Tamers's monsters in the Arena and Tavern in the Post-game.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Young Trainer
achievements.description: Defeat the Little Girl in Greatlog (the same girl you gave a SpotSlime).
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Where Were These Monsters When You Were in Trouble?
achievements.description: Defeat Prince Kameha and get the Elf (Cobi) or Lonely (Tara) Key.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: When Did You Train This Monster?
achievements.description: Defeat Prince Kameha and get the Traveler Key.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: King's Quest
achievements.description: Complete all King's Quests.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: The Lonely Elf
achievements.description: Complete the Elf World (Cobi) or Lonely World (Tara).
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Almost No Treasures
achievements.description: Find all the items inside chest and similar in the Elf World (Cobi) or Lonely World (Tara).
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Getting the 100% of This Tower
achievements.description: Complete and get all items in the Tower of Brawn World (Cobi) or Baffle World (Tara).
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Getting the 200% of This Tower
achievements.description: Complete and get all items in the Tower of Brawn World (Cobi) or Baffle World (Tara), in one session without leaving the Tower. (m: Neither chest or enemies respawn)
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: World of the Traveler
achievements.description: Complete the Traveler World.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: The Last Treasures
achievements.description: Find all the items inside chests and other treasure containers in the Traveler World.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: A Cameo?
achievements.description: Defeat Milayou in the Traveler World.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Hungry Chest
achievements.description: Find a Mimic in the wild.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: First Official Tournament
achievements.description: Complete the Tournament Rank C.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: New Rank
achievements.description: Complete the Tournament Rank B.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Almost There
achievements.description: Complete the Tournament Rank A.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: The Top
achievements.description: Complete the Tournament Rank S.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Last Fusions, Now for Real
achievements.description: Breed any of your monsters with the Monster Tamers's monsters in the Arena and Tavern in the Post-game, after befriended 100 monsters.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Ok, According to the Guide, This Should Be the Last One
achievements.description: Breed any of your monsters with the Dancer's Andreal in the Tavern after befriended 150 monsters.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Just Like in Pokemon Gold/Silver/Crystal
achievements.description: Defeat Terry in the Arena.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: Isn't a Bit Late to Start an Adventure?
achievements.description: Recruit Warubou.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: SlimePedia
achievements.description: Register all Slime Monsters in your Bestiary (Excluding WonderEgg).
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: DragonPedia
achievements.description: Register all Dragon Monsters in your Bestiary.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: BeastPedia
achievements.description: Register all Beast Monsters in your Bestiary.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: BirdPedia
achievements.description: Register all Bird Monsters in your Bestiary.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: PlantPedia
achievements.description: Register all Plant Monsters in your Bestiary (excluding Watabou).
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: BugPedia
achievements.description: Register all Bug Monsters in your Bestiary.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: DevilPedia
achievements.description: Register all Devil Monsters in your Bestiary.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: ZombiePedia
achievements.description: Register all Zombie Monsters in your Bestiary.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: MaterialPedia
achievements.description: Register all Material Monsters in your Bestiary.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: WaterPedia
achievements.description: Register all Water Monsters in your Bestiary.
achievements.author: Maximdraco

achievements.title: BossPedia
achievements.description: Register all Boss Monsters in your Bestiary.
achievements.author: Maximdraco
